title: Oxybaphus carletonii
taxonomy: Oxybaphus carletonii is classified within the family Polemoniaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the skyflower or globemallow family. The genus Oxybaphus is a small group of flowering plants, native to North America. The classification of Oxybaphus carletonii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. As a member of the Polemoniaceae family, Oxybaphus carletonii shares characteristics with other skyflower or globemallow species.
